questions.question: ML модель показывает 95% accuracy в training, но 70% в production. Training и serving используют разные реализации feature customer_ltv. Что это и как исправить?

options.text: Training-serving skew (feature skew): training compute = SUM last 365d, serving compute = AVG last 30d. Fix: единое определение feature в Feature Store (Feast). Одна feature definition → одинаковый compute для offline (training) и online (serving)

questions.explanation: Training-serving skew: feature computed differently в training vs production. Feature Store решает: одно определение (Python/YAML), один compute pipeline. Offline store (training) и online store (serving) получают идентичные значения. 95% → 70% gap = classic feature skew symptom.

questions.question: Real-time fraud detection: ML модель должна получить features за 5ms (p99). Какой store использовать?

options.text: Online store (Redis/DynamoDB): pre-materialized latest feature values. Key-value lookup по entity_id → p99 под 5ms. Batch pipeline ежедневно обновляет features, streaming pipeline для real-time features (last 1h activity)
Compute features on-the-fly при каждом запросе

questions.explanation: Online store = key-value (Redis/DynamoDB). Pre-materialized: batch pipeline → compute features → write to Redis. Lookup: GET user:12345:features → O(1), sub-millisecond. Offline (a): S3 read = seconds. On-the-fly (c): compute at query time = expensive + slow. Streaming features (last 1h) → Flink → Redis для real-time signals.
